Here's why I'm asking: The pre-primary fundraising deadline on July 25 is the most important our campaign has faced yet.
* This is the deadline before the only major electoral test of our campaign -- the August 2nd primary -- before the November election.

* The GOP convention just wrapped up, so we need to send my opponent a message that being in lockstep with Donald Trump has real consequences.

While my opponent and the Koch brothers-funded RGA go all in for Trump-style values, we're on the ground, organizing to keep up the progress we've worked so hard for in Washington state. We're going to make this campaign the grassroots, people-powered campaign worthy of Washington state -- but to do it, I need your help by July 25.
I set a big goal for my campaign, worthy of our grassroots effort: 1,000 online donations before midnight on Monday.
[**Will you be a part of this effort?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=OTI1NDA0MAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTYyMDM2NDYxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Next steps for Our Revolution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Our campaign has always been about a grassroots movement of Americans standing up and saying: "Enough is enough. This country and our government belong to all of us, not just a handful of billionaires."
I just finished speaking at the Democratic National Convention, where I addressed the historic nature of our grassroots movement and what's next for our political revolution.
I hope that I made you proud. I know that Jane and I are very proud of you.
**Our work will continue in the form of a new group called Our Revolution.** The goal of this organization will be no different from the goal of our campaign: we must transform American politics to make our political and economic systems once again responsive to the needs of working families.
**We cannot do this alone. All of us must be a part of Our Revolution.**
[**Join Our Revolution and help continue our critical work to create a government which represents all of us, and not just the 1 percent - a government based on the principles of economic, social, racial and environmental justice. Add your name here.**](https://ourrevolution.com/ "https://ourrevolution.com/")
When we started this campaign a little more than a year ago, the media and the political establishment considered us to be a "fringe" campaign. Well, we're not fringe anymore.
Thanks to your tireless work and generous contributions, we won 23 primaries and caucuses with more than 13 million votes, all of which led to the 1900 delegates we have on the floor this week at the Democratic convention.
What we have done together is absolutely unprecedented, but there is so much more to do. It starts with defeating Donald Trump in November, and then continuing to fight for every single one of our issues in order to transform America.
We are going to fight to make sure that the most progressive platform in the history of the Democratic Party becomes law. This means working for a $15 federal minimum wage, fighting for a national fracking ban, and so many more progressive priorities.
The political revolution needs you in order to make all this happen and more.
[**Add your name to say that you will join Our Revolution and be part of the fight for our progressive vision for America.**](https://ourrevolution.com/ "https://ourrevolution.com/")
Thank you for being a part of the continued political revolution.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Join Our Revolution»](https://ourrevolution.com/ "https://ourrevolution.com/")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016

name: Michelle Obama
subject: Don’t wait to offer your support, Peter
body:
It was an honor | Peter --

I just left the stage at the Democratic National Convention, where I spoke about why I believe Hillary Clinton should be president.

It was truly an honor to speak on her behalf. She is a devoted public servant, a passionate advocate for children and families, and a strong, experienced leader whom I trust with the overwhelming responsibilities of the presidency. And I am proud of the history she will make -- and the example she will set for my daughters, and all our sons and daughters -- as she breaks that highest, hardest glass ceiling.

But that will only happen if every single one of us does everything we can between now and November to support Hillary. Now that she’s the nominee and we know who she’s up against, none of us can sit on the sidelines.**[Chip in right now, Peter.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjYwNzI3MzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzNzA5NDA5S0&mt=1&rt=0) **

I have seen up close what it means to be president -- how you live every moment on a knife’s edge, dealing with the most complex, consequential issues imaginable. We need a leader with the temperament and the judgment to handle this role -- someone with a lifelong commitment to serving this country -- and I have no doubt that Hillary is that leader.

I trust Hillary to do this job well every single day, and to protect and build on the progress we have made together these past seven and a half years -- from creating jobs and providing health care for millions of Americans, to combating climate change and making historic strides for LGBT rights.

**Hillary has to be our next president. But that will only happen if we roll up our sleeves and do everything we can between now and November to show our support for her. So don’t wait to offer yours:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYwNzI3MzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzNzA5NDA5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Michelle

P.S. Every time you donate today, Peter, you will be automatically entered for a chance to meet Hillary at the convention on Thursday. So don’t wait -- **[show your support today!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjYwNzI3MzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzNzA5NDA5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

|

subject: ICYMI: Let's not make the same mistake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)
body:
| [ ](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymi_bus_all&n=1)
---
July 26, 2016

**In Case You Missed It...
**
Bill Bryant, Republican challenger for Governor, has been stumping across the state on his 23-city "Big Blue Bus Ballot Bash Tour" telling his volunteers and supporters that Republicans are responsible for electing Jay Inslee, because so many of them didn't turn in their ballots. Republican Rob McKenna lost the governor's race to Inslee by roughly 94,000 votes, and close to 175,000 Republican voters didn't vote in that election. The Marysville Globe reported on Bryant's campaign speech.

[**_Marysville Globe_**](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.marysvilleglobe.com%2Fnews%2F387935772.html&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymi_bus_all&n=2)

**GOP candidate for governor visits Marysville to call for votes**

by KIRK BOXLEITNER, Marysville Globe Reporter **Jul 22, 2016**

_MARYSVILLE — Like most local campaign offices, the Snohomish County Republican Party's headquarters is tucked away in an unassuming cluster of storefronts, but it was bustling with activity when gubernatorial candidate Bill Bryant stopped by to join volunteers in calling voters July 20._

_Bryant's Marysville stop was part of a 23-city bus tour, during which he hopes to motivate Washingtonians to turn in their ballots for him for the Aug. 2 primary._

_"Let me ask you, who elected Jay Inslee?" Bryant asked the volunteers, as they prepared to go to work on their cell phones. "The answer is Republicans, by not voting."_

_Bryant reported that Republican Rob McKenna lost the governor's race to Inslee by roughly 94,000 votes, then noted that close to 175,000 Republican voters didn't file a ballot._

_"The people in your lists are likely to vote for us, but they're unlikely to vote in the first place, unless they get a little nudge," Bryant said. "If they vote now, they'll vote again in November."_

_Bryant assured the volunteers that even if some of the phone numbers they called turned out to be bad, because of people moving or area codes changing, they were still doing productive work._

_"We'd rather find out those numbers are no good now, in July, and have months to clean up our phone lists, then have it surprise us in October," Bryant said._

_Given the close contests between not only McKenna and Inslee in 2012, but also between Republican Dino Rossi and Gov. Christine Gregoire in 2004 and 2008, Bryant expressed confidence that tipping the vote by just a few percentage points will be enough to make the difference._

_"Every vote matters," Bryant said. "Snohomish County could decide the election."_

**[Join Bill's Big Blue Bus Ballot Bash Tour](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/bustour?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymi_bus_all&n=3)**

**[Make a Donation to bring real leadership to Washington

](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fbill-bryant-for-governor%3Fsc%3Dbustour&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymi_bus_all&n=4)** [Full article from the _Marysville Globe_ : [http://www.marysvilleglobe.com/news/387935772.html](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.marysvilleglobe.com%2Fnews%2F387935772.html&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymi_bus_all&n=5)]

**Bill Bryant is a lifelong Washingtonian.** He’s built a company that operates on both sides of the mountains. Bill is chairman of BCI: a firm that helps farmers and agricultural companies export their crops. He is recognized as an innovative local government leader, a conservationist, and is the Republican candidate for governor. [
](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=icymi_bus_all&n=6)

| **_New York Times:_ Reeking, Oozing Algae Closes South Florida Beaches _ _** Friend -- We are facing an environmental disaster in South Florida. Families are stuck inside. Our local economy and communities are suffering. When I took office in 2013, I went to work. I saw first-hand the damage to our waterways due to toxic discharges into our water, and I knew something had to be done. From day one I have made it a priority to work on solutions large and small. Where are Republicans Rick Scott and Marco Rubio? This crisis just keeps getting worse. Rick Scott called for a state of emergency -- _the day after I asked him to do so._ Marco Rubio showed up to my district this month after ignoring the problem for far too long, _only to be booed out of town._ | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2cf4/738133e4/37b1b10d/7f82c8a5/3648722563/VEsE/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160726/?subsource=ngpattre160726")

Friend, there is no more time to waste. We need further action now. I continue to look for immediate solutions to limit Lake Okeechobee discharges as well as long term solutions to restore our waterways -- including reaching out to national leadership, federal agencies like the EPA, and my constituents.
[**Sign my petition to stand with me and let Rick Scott and Marco Rubio know: we have a moral obligation to solve this problem for future generations.**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2cf4/738133e4/37b1b10d/7f82c8a5/3648722563/VEsC/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160726/?subsource=ngpattre160726")

name: Russ Feingold
subject: What we're fighting for
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
We have so much to be proud of. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43c2/1c469400/64ace48/3570689/1473601721/VEsH/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/vol-is?utm_source=ema_2016-07-25_convention-dnc_Pledge-OOS&source=ema_2016-07-25_convention-dnc_Pledge-OOS&utm_campaign=convention-dnc&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- Just a few years ago, I wouldn't have believed it. But last night I watched First Lady Michelle Obama and Senators Elizabeth Warren and Bernie Sanders address delegates at the Democratic National Convention, and one thing was crystal clear: our bold, progressive vision was front and center on the stage of the Democratic National Convention. Last night reminded us of why we're in this: To fight for bold, progressive ideals of economic opportunity, civil rights, and a foreign policy that reconnects America with the rest of the world. That's what's been the core of our campaign since day one, and I can't tell you how great it is to see Democrats excited about a progressive vision for our country. **Our progressive movement is as strong as ever, and it's because of supporters like you. You've made sure that our voices are heard and our ideas rise to the top.** [**Together, we've been fighting for a bold, progressive vision. Now, I'm asking you to pledge your support in the fall. Add your name and commit to supporting our progressive movement at the ballot box this November.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43c2/1c469400/64ace48/3570689/1473601721/VEsE/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/vol-is?utm_source=ema_2016-07-25_convention-dnc_Pledge-OOS&source=ema_2016-07-25_convention-dnc_Pledge-OOS&utm_campaign=convention-dnc&utm_medium=ema") We know why we're fighting. As I've traveled to each of Wisconsin's 72 counties and logged over 50,000 miles on our campaign van, I've met with people of all backgrounds and listened to their stories. And what I've heard more than anything else is that people are having a hard time making ends meet. **It's simple: Our fight is about opening the door to opportunity for _all_ Americans. We need an economy that works for _everyone_ \-- not just those at the top. ** With your support, I'll take these values all the way to the United States Senate, where I'll work with Senator Warren, Senator Sanders, and others to fight for a progressive agenda that expands opportunity and puts working families first. It's not just about defeating Donald Trump and his divisive, hateful Republican Party: It's about moving our shared priorities ahead of the priorities of big business and special interest groups, and passing bold, progressive, forward-looking ideas into law. **[If you're with me, add your name right now to commit to taking our fight all the way to the Senate.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43c2/1c469400/64ace48/3570689/1473601721/VEsF/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/vol-is?utm_source=ema_2016-07-25_convention-dnc_Pledge-OOS&source=ema_2016-07-25_convention-dnc_Pledge-OOS&utm_campaign=convention-dnc&utm_medium=ema")** This campaign, this movement, is about all of us working together to make things better for all Americans. And it's up to us to get this done. Sincerely, Russ | [SIGN ON »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43c2/1c469400/64ace48/3570689/1473601721/VEsC/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/vol-is?utm_source=ema_2016-07-25_convention-dnc_Pledge-OOS&source=ema_2016-07-25_convention-dnc_Pledge-OOS&utm_campaign=convention-dnc&utm_medium=ema")

---|---
| Greetings,
---
| The Primary Election is just 13 days away and I need your help to finish strong and send a clear message!

We are running an efficient, well-organized and technologically advanced campaign, and my team and I are working day and night to spread our positive message for change.

**It’s disappointing my opponent is spending all of his money -- to the tune of $2 million dollars – to mislead Vermonters about my record, my priorities and my commitment to fighting for affordability when I'm elected Governor****. That's why we need you to [contribute TODAY](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=3f7314db7c&e=19cebfe173)! We need to send a message to my opponent about how much Vermonters value the truth and how important it is to us that political campaigns be a positive example for our children.**

I've been a small business owner, working hard to create jobs here in Vermont, my entire adult life. After years of frustration with Montpelier, I stepped up to run for the Senate to bring the small business perspective to the State House. After a lot of support and encouragement, I decided to step up again and run for Lt. Governor. And **I've worked alongside many other officials who share my commitment to making Vermont more affordable and our economy stronger -- that's why so many current and former legislators, and Governor Jim Douglas, are endorsing me. **

After the last 6 years, it is clear that addressing the growing crisis of affordability and making economic growth THE top priorities in Montpelier is going to require stronger, more focused leadership that listens. **That is why I decided to step up again and run for Governor. I am ready to lead and I've never been more motivated to serve. **

I'm confident that with your support we will win. **But I need the financial resources to finish this primary strong and counteract the mistruths of our opponent. **

**[A contribution today will help send a message that in Vermont politics, we want candidates and leaders who are role models for our children. ](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=ed67c5e362&e=19cebfe173)[Will you contribute $25, $50, $100 or even $250 today to send that message and help us finish strong?](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b49d4abe26&e=19cebfe173) **

Your contribution will ensure that we have the resources needed to succeed on August 9th and again on November 8th. **[Please donate today!](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=03b3469f6f&e=19cebfe173)**

Thanks again for all you have done and continue to do. Together we will win, the Vermont way!

Sincerely,

Phil Scott

---
Friend,

I'm Paul Tencher, Evan's campaign manager. I'm going to be keeping you in the loop about what we're doing to elect Evan to the Senate -- and what kind of support we're going to to need from the grassroots in Indiana.

I'm making my first request today, because we just got shocking news: The _Wall Street Journal_ is reporting that a **Koch brothers ' front group is dropping a _million_ dollars on ads attacking Evan -- and they're hitting the airwaves _tomorrow!_**

So we're establishing an **Emergency Fight-Back Fund** for Evan, and I'm looking for 500 supporters to get it going before the first ad hits.

**[Friend, will you become a charter member of the Emergency Fight-Back Fund by pitching in before midnight tonight?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50410/7be36b49/1ec89716/78f8fb06/235863803/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-fightbackfund?refcode=20160726&amount=25")**

The Kochs barely waited a _week_ before going negative on Evan. It shows how scared they are of him -- a hard-working, respected Hoosier who will put middle-class interests over special interests and fight for tax cuts, working families, and affordable education.

Let's be clear what the Kochs are paying for here: **They 're trying to buy another Senate seat for their radical agenda,** and they've found their newest special interest pawn in Congressman Todd Young.

**But we won 't let them get away with it. **Hoosiers are fighting back by contributing to our **Emergency Fight-Back Fund**. **[Friend, will you become a charter member by midnight tonight?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50410/7be36b49/1ec89716/78f8fb06/235863803/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-fightbackfund?refcode=20160726&amount=25")**

Thanks,

Paul Tencher

name: Madeleine Albright
subject: Did you know this about Donald Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
There is no one I admire more. | Peter --

There is no one I admire -- or trust -- more than Hillary Clinton, and that's what I'm going to say at the Democratic convention tonight.

This country needs her to win this election -- **[and she needs you on her side to do it.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjYwODA5MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzODMwODM5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Donald Trump simply has no credibility or standing to represent American interests abroad. His small-minded, unstable temperament, his shocking incoherence regarding the norms and details of foreign policy, and his dangerous ideology are all completely disqualifying.

Trump barely understood the Brexit decision, which sent ripples of economic anxiety and nationalist sentiment across Europe. He believes more, not fewer, nations should acquire nuclear weapons. He praises authoritarians like Vladimir Putin. He thinks people like President Obama and Hillary are to blame for the rise of ISIS and the collapse of Libya. He considers NATO -- a bedrock alliance dating back to 1949 -- a security agreement we could casually withdraw from or renegotiate unilaterally. Just this weekend, he talked about leaving the World Trade Organization as well.

Peter, I've known Hillary for decades, and I know that the choice we have to make in November could not be more clear or more consequential. **If you’re with her and trust her as much as I do, show her -- and show the world how much better we are than the disturbing and dark vision Donald Trump offers (and when you do, you’ll get a free sticker as a thank you for your support):** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYwODA5MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzODMwODM5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Madeleine

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Two things | Peter --

One of the most infuriating things I hear from potential donors is “I’m not donating to Hillary -- she’s going to win, so why does she need my help?”

1. We don’t have this locked up. At all. In fact, yesterday's CNN poll puts us down nationally.
2. We literally always need your help -- every **[$1](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjYwODE2NzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzODc0Njg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)** helps us do things like build a better voter registration program in Colorado or put another critical ad up in Florida.

One poll in isolation doesn't mean much, but I still don’t know how you could see this and not feel moved to do literally whatever you can to make sure that we close that gap and win in November. There’s so much at stake, Peter -- not just progress, but not losing our entire country to the bigotry Donald Trump represents. I don't want you to regret that you didn't help or donate as much as you could.

**So, let me ask -- will you chip in right now to get your free Team Hillary sticker?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYwODE2NzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzODc0Njg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Dennis

body:
Make July count. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTI1OTkxOQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTYyMTA4NjM5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, The end of July brings us the slow, calm, relaxing days of summer. It's when I normally like to spend time with Trudi and my kids and grandkids. But while the dog days of summer are upon us, my campaign is heating up -- and we can't afford to take our foot off the pedal between now and the primary on August 2\. The election is closer with each day, and the stakes are getting higher.
* The Republican Governors Association has its eye on this race. You and I know that this group has swayed blue states before -- we can't let that happen here in Washington.
* My opponent's campaign has launched its first ads, and we know there will be more to come.

Right before the primary, we need to file another fundraising report. And while all of that's going on, our organizers across the state are executing our get-out-the-vote efforts. They're knocking on doors, calling voters, and laying the essential groundwork for the election in November. We could use your support right now. Will you help my campaign raise another $5,000 by the official, public, pre-primary deadline? | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTI1OTkxOQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTYyMTA4NjM5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you so much for supporting this campaign.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
